faqs.question: What pests are most common in Woodside apartments and homes?
faqs.answer: Woodside properties commonly deal with German cockroaches, mice, ants, and occasional bed bug infestations. The neighborhood's older building stock and proximity to food establishments contribute to these pest pressures. Our general pest control service addresses all these pests with comprehensive treatment plans.
